title: GravityVS
description: A fork of GravityAPI that allows for changing an entity's gravity direction, with Valkyrien Skies support!
body:
# GravityVS

### ⚠️ Fork Information
This is an unofficial fork of Gravity API designed to add **Valkyrien Skies** support.
* **Direct Parent:** [Gravity API (Forge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gravity-api-forge)
* **Intermediate Fork:** [Gravity API (Fork)](https://modrinth.com/mod/gravity-api-fork)
* **Original Project:** [Gravity API](https://modrinth.com/mod/gravity-api)

**License:** Created under the terms of the original project's license.

---

### 📖 About GravityVS
The original Gravity API is restricted to static world coordinates and does not function correctly on moving physics entities. **GravityVS** solves this by allowing **Gravity Plating** and gravity changes to function properly on moving **Valkyrien Skies** ships.

While currently in Alpha (Cardinal directions only), the internal logic has been rewritten to eventually support **free rotation** on any axis, allowing you to walk seamlessly on the walls and ceilings of angled airships.

---

### Key Features
* **Ship Compatibility:** Gravity Plating now affects entities when placed on VS ships.

---

### 🚧 Alpha Status & Known Issues
> **⚠️ Early Alpha:** This mod is a work in progress.

1.  **Cardinal Directions Only (Current):** Free rotation is the end goal, but the mod is currently restricted to N, S, E, W, Up, Down while I stabilize the physics.
2.  **Sliding Bug:** You may experience sliding when a ship is at an angle. I am actively working on a fix for this friction issue.

---

### Requirements
* **Minecraft 1.20.1** (Forge)
* **[Valkyrien Skies](https://modrinth.com/mod/valkyrien-skies)** (Required)
